auto_accept_policy: v3 auto-accept requires all v3 gates and documented exceptions to be clear. Accepted/documented target gaps report accepted_with_documented_exceptions; nonessential shims or unaccepted exceptions keep v3 pending or blocked.

class_ownership_policy.multiple_public_classes: Modules with multiple public classes should be reduced to model bundles only, with explicit documentation.
class_ownership_policy.public_classes: Public classes should live in their own modules.

feature_policy: Behavior-preserving refactor only; do not add product features.

intentional_exceptions.reason: Safety boundary for event-fade research and TRIGGERED_FADE ownership; do not move into Event Alpha.

purpose: Move from accepted refactor v2 compatibility shims to fully finished refactor v3.

shim_policy.event_fade_py: event_fade.py remains intentionally outside Event Alpha. TRIGGERED_FADE must only come from event_fade.py plus proxy_fade.
shim_policy.new_imports: New code must import new package paths only.
shim_policy.old_event_alpha_shim_paths: Temporary compatibility paths. Remove old top-level Event Alpha shims unless explicitly retained as public compatibility entrypoints.
shim_policy.scanner_py: scanner.py remains a public CLI entrypoint compatibility wrapper.

size_policy.class_blocker_policy: Classes over 75 lines should be split or explicitly accepted.
size_policy.function_blocker_policy: Functions over 150 lines are blockers unless explicitly accepted.
size_policy.production_file_blocker_policy: Production files over 1,500 lines are blockers unless explicitly accepted.
